coverage_groups.name: basic_function
coverage_groups.description: Cover all ALU operation types with typical input values
coverage_groups.constraint: each ALU opcode exercised at least once

coverage_groups.name: shift_operations
coverage_groups.description: Cover barrel shifter: all 5 stages individually and combined, all shift types
coverage_groups.constraint: shift amounts covering single-bit and multi-bit combinations (0, 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, 15, 31)

coverage_groups.name: comparison_operations
coverage_groups.description: Cover unsigned and signed comparison true/false paths, including boundary values
coverage_groups.constraint: comparisons with small values, large values, sign-boundary values

coverage_groups.name: boundary_conditions
coverage_groups.description: Cover overflow, underflow, zero, all-ones, and max/min operands
coverage_groups.constraint: include wrap-around arithmetic results and edge-case comparisons

coverage_groups.name: bitwise_edge
coverage_groups.description: Cover bitwise operations with zero, all-ones, and self masks
coverage_groups.constraint: each bitwise op exercised with at least one edge-case mask

coverage_groups.name: error_handling
coverage_groups.description: Cover default passthrough behavior for unrecognized or invalid opcodes
coverage_groups.constraint: invalid opcode values 0x5 and 0xFF must be tested

coverage_model.opcode_coverage: all 11 defined opcodes plus 2 invalid opcodes must be exercised
coverage_model.result_value_coverage: result values of 0, 1, max, and alternating patterns must appear
coverage_model.barrel_stage_coverage: each of the 5 barrel shifter stages must be triggered individually and in combination
